title: Modrinth Dark GUI
description: Modrinth Dark GUI brings Minecraft a sleek dark theme with Modrinth’s signature green accent colors.
body:
## 💚 Modrinth Dark GUI
Modrinth Dark GUI is a clean and modern resource pack that transforms Minecraft’s interface with Modrinth’s signature dark theme and green accents. Sleek, minimal, and easy on the eyes – perfect for players who love the Modrinth aesthetic.
### 🎨 Features
🔹 Dark mode with Modrinth’s iconic green highlights  
🔹 Minimalist and polished style  
🔹 Fully vanilla-friendly – only GUI textures are changed  
🔹 No blocks, items, or sounds are modified  

### ✨ Why Use This Pack?
This pack is perfect for players who want a stylish dark interface that feels modern while staying true to Minecraft’s original experience.
